feedback_mechanism.description: This document outlines the user feedback collection system for ChefAtHome.

methods.description: Conduct surveys after each lesson to gather user impressions and suggestions.
Implement a feedback button within the app for users to submit comments at any time.
Organize focus groups with internal testers to discuss their experiences and gather qualitative data.

goals: Understand user satisfaction with lessons and features.
Identify areas for improvement in lesson content and delivery.
Gather suggestions for new features or lessons.
